subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is no God but Him, and He Who hath come from the heaven of revelation is verily the Dawning-Place of My Beauty and the Dayspring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی من سماء الوحی انه لمطلع جمالی و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
